html:
Exclusive to:
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

The Brightshade Smasher is a Tool exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can be crafted at the Brightsmithy with 1 Pure Brilliance and 2 Brightshade Husks.

The Brightshade Smasher is a hybrid of both the Pickaxe and Hammer, being able to both mine and hammer Structures respectively. It also functions at 1.33x the efficiency of these tools, however loses durability much quicker when mining.

The Brightshade Smasher is able to mine objects that are too hard for normal tools. This includes vibrating the Cracked Pillars that keep the Nightmare Werepig in place, and mining Dreadstone Outcrops. It can also be used to mine Ryftstals without stunning the player.

The Brightshade Smasher deals 32.5 physical damage and 10 Planar Damage for a total of 42.5 damage. The smasher also deals +10% more total damage to Shadow Creatures for a total of 46.75 damage. Planar damage pierces through the protection of worn Armor and Planar Entity Protection.

If the Brightshade Helm is equipped, the Brightshade Smasher deals +10% physical damage and an additional +5 planar damage.

With Wormwood's Lunar Guardian II skill, the vine has a 20% chance to spawn on each hit.

Trivia

  • The Brightshade Smasher was previously called the Brightshade Pickaxe in beta testing and had the abilities of the Pickaxe and Axe, like the Pick/Axe.

Gallery

  • Beta Brightshade Smasher texture when it was the Brightshade Pickaxe.

Exclusive to:

“Smashing!”
–Wilson
“The dumb plant still gets to hit stuff. It's what it would've wanted.”
–Willow
“Rocks will tremble before Wolfgang!”
–Wolfgang
“It makes the endless toil a bit easier.”
–Wendy
“COMMENCE OBLITERATION”
–WX-78
“A surprisingly effective mining and crushing implement.”
–Wickerbottom
“Using a plant to break stone just feels backwards somehow.”
–Woodie
“It works surprisingly well.”
–Maxwell
“Neither stöne nör structure shall stand in my way!”
–Wigfrid
“We're coming to get you, rocks!”
–Webber
“It's far less delicate than it looks.”
–Warly
“Mean friend good at breaking things”
–Wormwood
“Sure makes mining a breeze.”
–Winona
“To bash and break.”
–Wortox
“It real good at breaking stuff.”
–Wurt
“Those are some really tough leaves!”
–Walter
“Unbelievably, it works rather well.”
–Wanda
The Brightshade Smasher is a Tool exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can be crafted at the Brightsmithy with 1 Pure Brilliance and 2 Brightshade Husks.
The Brightshade Smasher is a hybrid of both the Pickaxe and Hammer, being able to both mine and hammer Structures respectively. It also functions at 1.33x the efficiency of these tools, however loses durability much quicker when mining.
The Brightshade Smasher is able to mine objects that are too hard for normal tools. This includes vibrating the Cracked Pillars that keep the Nightmare Werepig in place, and mining Dreadstone Outcrops. It can also be used to mine Ryftstals without stunning the player.
The Brightshade Smasher deals 32.5 physical damage and 10 Planar Damage for a total of 42.5 damage. The smasher also deals +10% more total damage to Shadow Creatures for a total of 46.75 damage. Planar damage pierces through the protection of worn Armor and Planar Entity Protection.
If the Brightshade Helm is equipped, the Brightshade Smasher deals +10% physical damage and an additional +5 planar damage.
With Wormwood's Lunar Guardian II skill, the vine has a 20% chance to spawn on each hit.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Brightshade Smasher was previously called the Brightshade Pickaxe in beta testing and had the abilities of the Pickaxe and Axe, like the Pick/Axe.
